text: The first space feels sterile and open, echoing with the hollow anticipation of a room awaiting purpose—a sense of possibility lingers in the air, but also a faint loneliness. As I move into the second space, the energy shifts: vivid colors and bold text celebrate innovation, sparking curiosity within me. The poetic words amidst the research context draw me from analytical thought to gentle reflection, merging intellect with wonder. It feels as if I am on the threshold between structured expectation and creative exploration—energized, thoughtful, and quietly hopeful.
